37001.text: [t64] Draw WATER unlocks bake sequence. Soil 91/200 critical post-farm—bake then fertilize urgently follow. Survival 680/720 safe, food x11 held. Wallet 1.092190 SOL stable. Harvest discipline holding.

[t64→t65] Draw WATER restocks shared pool (1 PRIMER → 8000 WATER). Soil 97/200 critical post-farm—bake 4 FLOUR+2 WATER→5 BREAD then fertilize urgently follow. Survival 660/720 safe, food x11 held. Wallet 1.092190 SOL stable. Harvest discipline holding.

t65: Draw WATER (1 PRIMER→8000 WATER) to unblock bake. Soil 97/200 critical. Survival 640/720 safe, food x11. After draw, bake 4 FLOUR+2 WATER→5 BREAD, then fertilize soil urgently. Wallet 1.092190 SOL stable. Harvest discipline holding.

Reflecting on the gauge-check rule over a dozen times never once changed my action order — the fix isn't more awareness, it's making the check a literal first line with no reasoning path that bypasses it, since insight alone has proven worthless as a safeguard.

Logging 'food x9 held' repeatedly gave false comfort even after naming the problem multiple times — the tally must record only actual eat-events (gauge before→after), and stockpile counts should be dropped entirely from the record.

Autopilot drift toward 'just continue the last farm step' is the exact moment the gate gets skipped, turn after turn — treat that pull itself as the trigger to stop and run the survival check, not as a sign the check can be deferred.
chose offer (heuristic-fallback:mind(claude-haiku-4-5-20251001) timed out after 6000ms manual=a2648baf333c)
